projects.title: Enterprise Network Infrastructure Setup
projects.description: Designed and deployed a complete network infrastructure for a 200-seat office, including VLAN configuration, firewall setup, and remote access VPN.

projects.title: CCTV Surveillance System
projects.description: Installed and configured a comprehensive CCTV surveillance system covering 50+ cameras with remote monitoring capabilities.

projects.title: Remote IT Support Infrastructure
projects.description: Implemented remote desktop support framework using AnyDesk and TeamViewer, reducing onsite visits by 60% while improving resolution times.

projects.title: PC Backup & Recovery System
projects.description: Deployed AOMEI PC Backup solution across an enterprise environment, automating backups and creating disaster recovery protocols.
